name: The Sand Trap Indoor Golf
about: The Sand Trap Indoor Golf in Linden, Michigan, offers 3 TruGolf E6 Simulators for year-round play, featuring over 100 World Championship courses including Pebble Beach, Firestone, and Pinehurst. Each simulator provides real-time ball flight technology, and players can bring their own clubs or use the venue's equipment. The facility supports various activities including full rounds, driving range practice, leagues for men, women, and children, and tournaments such as scramble and best ball formats. Serving Linden and surrounding communities, it provides a dedicated space for golf regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: TruGolf E6 Simulators with over 100 premium courses
Real-time ball flight technology for accurate gameplay
Variety of play modes including tournaments and leagues
All-weather access to championship-level golf courses
4 unique driving ranges and short game complex for practice

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 simulators with real-time ball flight technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or use the venue's equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: BYOB is likely allowed, though not explicitly stated. Food services are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Typical simulation times vary, but most full rounds take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Sand Trap offers children's leagues and family-friendly tournaments.
